---
title: "Software"
lang: en
---

# Software

## Software developemnt

I develop geospatial-related software.

- [jpdata](https://plugins.qgis.org/plugins/jpdata/): QGIS plugin to download and load various geographic data of Japan
- geojp: R package (currently submitting to CRAN) to download and load various geographic data of Japan

Please check my personal [https://github.com/babayoshihiko](https://github.com/babayoshihiko) pages.

## Translations

Doing meta analysisin R

- [Original](https://doing-meta.guide/)
- [Japanese](https://babayoshihiko.github.io/Doing-Meta-Analysis-in-R-ja/) Please note that Bookdown.org version is older.

The Epidemiologist R Handbook

- [https://epirhandbook.com/en/](https://doing-meta.guide/)
- [Japanese](https://epirhandbook.com/jp/index.jp.html) Translated many chapters including GIS.
